name: Montero Mining & Exploration Ltd.
description: Montero Mining & Exploration Ltd. (TSX.V:MON) is a Canada-based mineral exploration and development company with a primary focus on gold and copper projects in Chile. The company employs a disciplined, geology-led exploration strategy, integrating advanced data analysis, artificial intelligence, and machine-learning tools to enhance target generation and operational efficiency. By combining these modern technological approaches with experienced geological judgment and rigorous field validation, Montero aims to identify and develop high-potential mineral properties within Chile’s major mining belts, maintaining a commitment to corporate governance and sustainable exploration practices.
